## Conditional Statements

### 3.1 Check login [Spring, 2025-2026]

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2026/ex_3_1.1.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_3_1.1.py >}}
```

### 3.2 Roots of a quadratic equation [Spring, 2025-2026]

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2026/ex_3_1.2.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_3_1.2.py >}}
```
